topic: Design a /deploy skill for Claude Code that deploys HTML proposals to Vercel

consensus.--prod directly: No preview step. Static HTML near-zero failure rate.
consensus.auth check first: vercel whoami before deploy. Fail fast.
consensus..vercel/ gitignored: Per-proposal .gitignore. Name is source of truth.
consensus.skill justified: Auth check + name derivation + .gitignore + URL output.

key_decisions.project_json: Let CLI manage it, gitignore it, name is source of truth

pre_ship_gate: Verify --name idempotency: deploy twice with same --name, confirm same project/URL
synthesis: Build with: auth check -> validate index.html -> derive name from folder -> deploy --yes --name --prod -> manage .gitignore -> print URL
